revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Kashima Jingu]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:File:Kashima-kanameishi-shinzu-namazu-e.jpg]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:鹿島要石真図（江戸時代の鯰絵）|lt=“Kanameishi” – A depiction showing Kashima Jingu enshrining the sacred stone (upper panel: the stone enshrined at Kashima Jingu; lower panel: Takemikazuchi Ōkami, brandishing his sword to subdue a giant catfish)|lt_ja=「鹿島要石真図」]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Automatic wikipedia redirects
revision.text:
#redirect[[:en:File:Kashima-kanameishi-shinzu-namazu-e.jpg]]
[[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:鹿島要石真図（江戸時代の鯰絵）|lt=“Kanameishi” – A depiction showing Kashima Jingu enshrining the sacred stone (upper panel: the stone enshrined at Kashima Jingu; lower panel: Takemikazuchi Ōkami, brandishing his sword to subdue a giant catfish)|lt_ja=「鹿島要石真図」]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages created from Interlanguage links]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
#redirect[[:en:File:Kashima-kanameishi-shinzu-namazu-e.jpg]]
[[ja:鹿島要石真図（江戸時代の鯰絵）|lt=“Kanameishi” – A depiction showing Kashima Jingu enshrining the sacred stone (upper panel: the stone enshrined at Kashima Jingu; lower panel: Takemikazuchi Ōkami, brandishing his sword to subdue a giant catfish)|lt_ja=「鹿島要石真図」]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Kashima Jingu" to "Kashima Jingū"
revision.text:
#redirect[[:en:File:Kashima-kanameishi-shinzu-namazu-e.jpg]]
[[ja:鹿島要石真図（江戸時代の鯰絵）|lt=“Kanameishi” – A depiction showing Kashima Jingū enshrining the sacred stone (upper panel: the stone enshrined at Kashima Jingū; lower panel: Takemikazuchi Ōkami, brandishing his sword to subdue a giant catfish)|lt_ja=「鹿島要石真図」]]

redirect[[:en:File:Kashima-kanameishi-shinzu-namazu-e.jpg]]
[[ja:鹿島要石真図（江戸時代の鯰絵）|lt=“Kanameishi” – A depiction showing Kashima Jingū enshrining the sacred stone (upper panel: the stone enshrined at Kashima Jingū; lower panel: Takemikazuchi Ōkami, brandishing his sword to subdue a giant catfish)|lt_ja=「鹿島要石真図」]]
